---
title: "Xiaoyu's FinTech Site"
---

# Welcome
![My Photo](images/me.jpg){width=300px}

Hello! Welcome to my website.

I am a Duke student interested in financial technology, data analysis, and algorithmic trading.

## About This Site

This site is created for FinTech 533 and will be used to present my course projects.

## Projects

More updates coming soon.
